en.ahmedali: They will answer: "We did not fulfil our devotional obligations,
en.ahmedraza: They said, “We never used to offer the prayer.”
en.arberry: They shall say, 'We were not of those who prayed, and
en.daryabadi: They will say. 'we have not been of those who prayed.
en.hilali: They will say: "We were not of those who used to offer their Salat (prayers)
en.itani: They will say, “We were not of those who prayed.
en.maududi: They will answer: “We were not among those who observed Prayer,
en.mubarakpuri: They will say: "We were not of those who used to offer the Salah,"
en.pickthall: They will answer: We were not of those who prayed
en.qarai: They will answer, ‘We were not among those who prayed.
en.qaribullah: They will reply: 'We were not among those who prayed
en.sahih: They will say, "We were not of those who prayed,
en.sarwar: They will reply, "We did not pray,
en.shakir: They shall say: We were not of those who prayed;
en.wahiduddin: and they shall reply, "We were not among those who prayed;
en.yusufali: They will say: "We were not of those who prayed;
fa.ansarian: می گویند: ما از نمازگزاران نبودیم
fa.ghomshei: آنان جواب دهند که ما از نمازگزاران نبودیم.
fa.khorramdel: می‌گویند: (در جهان) از زمره‌ی نمازگزاران نبوده‌ایم. [[«الْمُصَلِّینَ»: نمازگزاران.]]
